meaning: n.(=Fenian)爱尔兰勇士,芬尼安运动员
examples: In Wolf form the fianna are quite striking.
Mr Lenihan's Fianna Fail party paid a heavy price in elections earlier this year.
Fianna Fail and Mr Cowen have a poor record on EU referendums, losing two out of three since 2001.
Fianna Fail headquarters clarified that they received the donation the day before Mr Cowen's fundraising dinner.
Fianna Fail have been in power for the past 14 years with various junior coalition partners.
